segments.text: The human brain is a complex organ responsible for controlling various functions of the body. It is divided into several
, each with distinct roles. The left hemisphere is primarily associated with
, logical reasoning, and analytical thinking, while the right hemisphere is linked to creativity and
. Neurons, the basic units of the brain, communicate through connections called synapses.
, a process essential for learning and memory, involves strengthening these connections based on experience.
. Research into brain function continues to evolve, revealing the intricate relationship between cognitive processes and behavior.

academic.passage: The study of artificial intelligence (AI) has significantly advanced in recent years. Researchers are now developing algorithms that allow machines to learn from data, improving their performance over time. AI applications are becoming increasingly prevalent in various fields, including healthcare, finance, and transportation. For instance, AI can analyze medical images with remarkable accuracy, assisting doctors in diagnosing diseases. As AI technology continues to evolve, ethical considerations regarding its use also emerge, prompting discussions about its impact on society.

questions.q: What is the main focus of the passage?
options: The advancements and implications of AI technology
The ethical concerns around technological advancements
questions.explain: 此段落的主要重點在於人工智能技術的進步及其影響。

questions.q: Which field is mentioned as an application of AI?
questions.explain: 段落中提及醫療保健領域的AI應用。

questions.q: What can be inferred about the future of AI?
options: AI will likely become less relevant
Ethical discussions around AI will diminish
AI technology is expected to grow and evolve
AI will only be used in finance
questions.explain: 可以推斷，AI技術預計將持續增長和演變。

questions.q: What does the word 'algorithms' refer to in the passage?
questions.explain: 'Algorithms'指的是計算過程中的逐步步驟。

daily.passage: Attention students: The university library will be closed for renovations from March 1 to March 15. All services will resume on March 16. Please plan your studies accordingly.

questions.q: When will the library be closed?
questions.explain: 圖書館將於3月1日至3月15日關閉。
圖書館服務將在3月16日恢復。
